title: Epsilon (3) - Assuming the Truth
popupHtml:
Epsilon (3) - Assuming the Truth

**Character:** Michael **Prerequisite:** Donate $5000 through the epsilonprogram.com website after the [Accepting the Truth](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13402) mission. The vehicles you need to find and deliver are listed below. - [Pegassi Vacca](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=12933) - [Benefactor Surano](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=12888) - [Declasse Tornado](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13083) - [Enus Super Diamond](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=12889) - [Dinka Double-T](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=12891) **Gold Medal Requirements:** - None

title: Epsilon (5) - Bearing the Truth
popupHtml:
Epsilon (5) - Bearing the Truth

**Character:** Michael **Prerequisite:** Donate $10,000 through the epsilonprogram.com website after the [Chasing the Truth](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=471185) mission. **Gold Medal Requirements:** - None _Note: Do not switch to other characters or begin activities that change Michael's clothes, or the 10-day timer will reset. Sleeping in Michael's house can speed up the process._
